case_title: PHILLIP KOBERNICK et al VS. SOPHIE LAU et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KOBERNICK, PHILLIP FEINBERG, SAMANTHA KART, SAMUEL BROTHERS AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE GOOD EARTH REALTY AND INVESTMENTS, INC. LAU, JEFFREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOBERNICK, PHILLIP FEINBERG, SAMANTHA KART, SAMUEL BROTHERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE $5,041.23 PRINCIPAL, $174.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,215.48, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST PLAINTIFFS' JUDGMENT FOR ANY AMOUNTS ($3,541.25) ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFFS. PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM AGAINST GOOD EARTH REALTY AND JEFFREY LAU ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-30-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOOD EARTH REALTY AND INVESTMENTS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $29.75 SERVED NOV-29-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, JEFFREY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $59.50 - SERVED NOV-29-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBTS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
